title: x-gnap OpenAPI Security Scheme Extension
description: JSON Schema for the x-gnap vendor extension, representing GNAP (RFC 9635) authorization in OpenAPI documents.

grant_endpoint.description: The URL of the GNAP authorization server's grant endpoint where clients initiate grant requests (RFC 9635 Section 2).

key_proofs.description: Supported key proof mechanisms for demonstrating possession of a key (RFC 9635 Section 7.3).

interaction.description: Supported interaction modes for resource owner authorization (RFC 9635 Section 2.5).

start.description: Methods the client can use to start interaction with the resource owner.

finish.description: Methods the client can use to receive the result of interaction.

access_rights.description: Defined resource access right types and their supported actions (RFC 9635 Section 8).

supported.description: Whether the authorization server supports grant continuation.

poll.description: Whether the client can poll for grant status.

wait.description: Whether the authorization server supports the wait parameter for long-polling.

key_rotation.description: Whether the authorization server supports key rotation for bound access tokens.

rotation.description: Whether access tokens can be rotated (RFC 9635 Section 6.1).

revocation.description: Whether access tokens can be revoked (RFC 9635 Section 6.2).

alg.description: Supported signing algorithms for this proof method.

content_digest.description: Whether Content-Digest header is required for request body integrity.

type.description: The type of resource being accessed.

actions.description: Permitted actions on this resource type.

locations.description: Specific resource server locations where this access right applies.

datatypes.description: Types of data that can be accessed.
